# Knowledge Index Template

Use this for durable indexes of docs, code, tests, issues, PRs, and decisions.

```markdown
# Knowledge Index: <project or workstream>

## Index policy

<Scope, freshness rule, source hierarchy, and update cadence.>

## Sources

| ID | Source | Type | Location | Owner/status | Use for | Do not use for |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|

## Requirement and proof links

| Topic | Canonical docs | Code paths | Tests | Issues/PRs | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|

## Deprecated or low-trust sources

| Source | Reason | Replacement | Action |
|---|---|---|---|
```
